codeBlocks: poetry run mechx request --prompts "Estimate the chance that Ethereum volatility exceeds 50,000 by the end of 2030" --priority-mech 0xb3c6319962484602b00d5587e965946890b82101 --tools superforcaster --chain-config gnosis

alertText: This quickstart covers the basics. For full details and advanced options, see the Olas Stack Documentation.
